Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Huh... Quite a set-up here. And perfectly fitting, if you ask me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}She will be providing support to both sides equally. Is that acceptable?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Wait! You can't just decide that for me![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I won't help my friends hurt each other![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}If you're wholly against the idea of us fighting, then you shouldn't be on our side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Amada and I know what we want, and we're ready to fight for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Aigis-san, have you decided what you'll do if you get the keys?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Takeba was right—we need to recognize our feelings. Sounds like you still don't.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}If you don't have anything to fight for, just hand over your key and walk away.[n]{f 1 1}
